deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription:
This action cannot be undone. The following data will be deleted:

• Active subscription (canceled immediately, remaining period forfeited)
• Your owned fanmarks (will be returned and enter grace period)
• Favorites and notification settings
• Profile information

License history will be retained, but your username will be displayed as "Deleted User".
deleteAccount.successDescription: Thank you for using our service.
deleteAccount.errorDescription: An error occurred while deleting your account. Please try again later.
deleteAccount.subscriptionWarningDescription: Your current subscription will be canceled immediately, and the remaining period (approximately {daysLeft} days) will be forfeited.

userSettings.updateSuccessDescription: Your user settings have been updated successfully
